APPROVE
Clean, well-scoped implementation. The recovery loop is implemented as pure functions (`runQuotaRecoveryProbePass`/`runQuotaRecoveryProbeLoop`) with explicit `now`/`sleep` seams, enabling deterministic tests. The new `AllExhausted` helper correctly returns elapsed entries that `ExhaustedAt` filters out — necessary for the probe loop to find work. artifact: .ddx/executions/20260503T013133-5074c466/reviewer-stream.log

success
Clean, well-scoped implementation. The recovery loop is implemented as pure functions (`runQuotaRecoveryProbePass`/`runQuotaRecoveryProbeLoop`) with explicit `now`/`sleep` seams, enabling deterministic tests. The new `AllExhausted` helper correctly returns elapsed entries that `ExhaustedAt` filters out — necessary for the probe loop to find work. Backoff bookkeeping is cleaned up when providers leave the exhausted set, avoiding stale state across re-exhaustion cycles.
